data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: All data transmitted between users and Google servers is encrypted.

data.title: BeyondCorp
data.description: Zero-trust security model that safeguards internal Google networks.
data.technical_spec: Verifies identity and device context for access.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: User data is encrypted when stored on Google's servers.
data.technical_spec: AES encryption standards applied to stored data.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust systems in place to prevent Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Integrated DDoS prevention on the cloud infrastructure.

data.title: Phishing Protection
data.description: Advanced threat detection systems identify and mitigate phishing attempts.
data.technical_spec: Real-time threat assessment and user intervention alerts.
